spells.name: Sacred Flame
spells.text: Flame-like radiance descends on a creature you can see. Dex save or 1d8 radiant; no benefit from cover. Scales 2d8/3d8/4d8 at 5/11/17.

spells.name: Guidance
spells.text: Touch a willing creature. Once before the spell ends it adds 1d4 to one ability check of its choice.

spells.name: Thaumaturgy
spells.text: A minor wonder: booming voice, flickering flames, tremors, a sudden sound, a door flung open/shut, or changed eye color. Up to three effects at once.

spells.name: Spare the Dying
spells.text: Touch a living creature at 0 HP; it becomes stable. No effect on undead or constructs.

spells.name: Light
spells.text: Touch an object ≤10 ft; it sheds 20-ft bright light + 20-ft dim. A held hostile object's bearer makes a Dex save to avoid.

spells.name: Resistance
spells.text: Touch a willing creature. Once before the spell ends it adds 1d4 to one saving throw of its choice.

spells.name: Mending
spells.text: Repair a single break or tear ≤1 ft in an object. Doesn't restore magical properties.

spells.name: Fire Bolt
spells.text: Ranged spell attack; 1d10 fire. Unattended flammables ignite. Scales 2d10/3d10/4d10.

spells.name: Ray of Frost
spells.text: Ranged spell attack; 1d8 cold and target's speed −10 ft until your next turn. Scales 2d8/3d8/4d8.

spells.name: Prestidigitation
spells.text: A harmless sensory effect, light/snuff a flame, clean/soil, chill/warm/flavor food, a mark for 1 hr, or a trinket in your hand.

spells.name: Mage Hand
spells.text: A spectral hand manipulates objects, opens doors, pours, carries ≤10 lb, moves ≤30 ft per use. Can't attack or use magic items.

spells.name: Minor Illusion
spells.text: Create a sound or a still image of an object. Investigation vs your save DC to discern.

spells.name: Eldritch Blast
spells.text: Ranged spell attack; 1d10 force. One beam, +1 beam at 5/11/17; aim each separately.

spells.name: Chill Touch
spells.text: Ranged spell attack; 1d8 necrotic and target can't regain HP until your next turn. Undead also have disadvantage attacking you. Scales 2d8/3d8/4d8.

spells.name: Poison Spray
spells.text: Con save or 1d12 poison. Scales 2d12/3d12/4d12.

spells.name: Dancing Lights
spells.text: Up to four torch-lights (or one glowing humanoid form) hover. Move them ≤60 ft as a bonus action, each within 20 ft of another.

spells.name: True Strike
spells.text: Your next attack against the target before the end of your next turn has advantage.

spells.name: Message
spells.text: Whisper a message to one creature; only it hears, and it can whisper back. Passes through solids if you know the target is there.

spells.name: Acid Splash
spells.text: One or two creatures within 5 ft of each other make a Dex save or take 1d6 acid. Scales 2d6/3d6/4d6.

spells.name: Shocking Grasp
spells.text: Melee spell attack (advantage vs metal-armored targets); 1d8 lightning and target can't take reactions until its next turn. Scales 2d8/3d8/4d8.

spells.name: Cure Wounds
spells.text: Touch a creature; it regains 1d8 + spellcasting mod HP. No effect on undead/constructs. +1d8 per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Healing Word
spells.text: A creature you can see regains 1d4 + spellcasting mod HP. No effect on undead/constructs. +1d4 per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Bless
spells.text: Up to three creatures add 1d4 to attack rolls and saves. +1 target per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Bane
spells.text: Up to three creatures (Cha save negates) subtract 1d4 from attack rolls and saves. +1 target per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Guiding Bolt
spells.text: Ranged spell attack; 4d6 radiant and next attack against the target before your next turn has advantage. +1d6 per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Shield of Faith
spells.text: A creature gains +2 AC for the duration.

spells.name: Command
spells.text: A one-word command; Wis save or the target obeys on its next turn (Approach, Drop, Flee, Grovel, Halt). +1 target per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Sanctuary
spells.text: Attackers of the warded creature make a Wis save or must pick a new target. Ends if the warded one attacks or casts a harmful spell.

spells.name: Inflict Wounds
spells.text: Melee spell attack; 3d10 necrotic. +1d10 per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Detect Evil and Good
spells.text: Sense the location of aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead within 30 ft, and consecrated/desecrated places.

spells.name: Detect Poison and Disease
spells.text: Sense and identify poisons, poisonous creatures, and diseases within 30 ft.

spells.name: Create or Destroy Water
spells.text: Create up to 10 gallons of clean water (or rain in a 30-ft cube), or destroy that much water/fog. +10 gal per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Purify Food and Drink
spells.text: All nonmagical food and drink in a 5-ft sphere is purified of poison and disease.

spells.name: Burning Hands
spells.text: 15-ft cone; Dex save, 3d6 fire (half on success). Ignites flammables. +1d6 per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Magic Missile
spells.text: Three darts, each 1d4+1 force, auto-hit, split as you like. +1 dart per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Shield
spells.text: Reaction to being hit or targeted by Magic Missile: +5 AC until your next turn (incl. the trigger) and no Magic Missile damage.

spells.name: Sleep
spells.text: Roll 5d8; creatures in a 20-ft radius fall unconscious in ascending-HP order until exhausted. Undead/charm-immune unaffected. +2d8 per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Thunderwave
spells.text: 15-ft cube; Con save, 2d8 thunder and pushed 10 ft (half/no push on success). Audible 300 ft. +1d8 per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Color Spray
spells.text: Roll 6d10; creatures in a 15-ft cone, ascending-HP order, are blinded until your next turn until the total is exhausted. +2d10 per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Chromatic Orb
spells.text: Ranged spell attack; 3d8 of a chosen type (acid/cold/fire/lightning/poison/thunder). +1d8 per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Witch Bolt
spells.text: Ranged spell attack; 1d12 lightning, then 1d12 auto each turn as an action. Ends if target leaves range/sight. +1d12 initial per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Expeditious Retreat
spells.text: Dash as the casting bonus action, and as a bonus action each turn after.

spells.name: False Life
spells.text: Gain 1d4+4 temporary HP. +5 temp HP per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Jump
spells.text: A creature's jump distance triples.

spells.name: Feather Fall
spells.text: Up to five falling creatures descend 60 ft/round and take no fall damage.

spells.name: Detect Magic
spells.text: Sense magic within 30 ft; with an action, see auras and learn each school. Blocked by 1 ft stone / thin lead.

spells.name: Hex
spells.text: +1d6 necrotic on your hits vs the target, and it has disadvantage on checks with one chosen ability. Move on drop as a bonus action. Higher slots extend duration.

spells.name: Armor of Agathys
spells.text: Gain 5 temp HP; melee attackers who hit you take 5 cold. +5/+5 per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Arms of Hadar
spells.text: All creatures in 10 ft make a Str save, 2d6 necrotic and no reactions until their next turn (half/keep reactions on success). +1d6 per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Hellish Rebuke
spells.text: Reaction when damaged by a creature you can see: Dex save, 2d10 fire (half on success). +1d10 per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Charm Person
spells.text: A humanoid (Wis save, advantage if in combat with you) is charmed until the spell ends or harmed. It knows afterward. +1 target per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Comprehend Languages
spells.text: Understand any spoken language you hear and any written language you touch (1 min/page). No secret messages.

spells.name: Protection from Evil and Good
spells.text: A willing creature is protected from aberrations/celestials/elementals/fey/fiends/undead: they attack at disadvantage; can't charm, frighten, or possess it.

spells.name: Lesser Restoration
spells.text: End one disease or one condition: blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned.

spells.name: Spiritual Weapon
spells.text: A spectral weapon: melee spell attack on cast and as a bonus action each turn, 1d8 + mod force; move it 20 ft. +1d8 per two slots above 2nd.

spells.name: Hold Person
spells.text: A humanoid (Wis save) is paralyzed, repeating the save each turn. +1 target per slot above 2nd.

spells.name: Prayer of Healing
spells.text: Up to six creatures regain 2d8 + mod HP. No effect on undead/constructs. +1d8 per slot above 2nd.

spells.name: Aid
spells.text: Up to three creatures' HP max and current HP +5. +5 per slot above 2nd.

spells.name: Silence
spells.text: A 20-ft-radius sphere: no sound in or through it; everyone inside deafened; no thunder damage or verbal-component spells. Thematically loud in this campaign.

spells.name: Blindness/Deafness
spells.text: A creature (Con save) is blinded or deafened, repeating the save each turn. +1 target per slot above 2nd.

spells.name: Augury
spells.text: Learn whether a course of action in the next 30 min leads to weal, woe, both, or nothing. Repeated casts the same day get unreliable.

spells.name: Calm Emotions
spells.text: Humanoids in a 20-ft radius (Cha save) either lose charm/fright effects, or become indifferent toward chosen creatures.

spells.name: Continual Flame
spells.text: A flame as bright as a torch springs from an object; gives off heatless light, can't be extinguished.

spells.name: Enhance Ability
spells.text: A creature gains advantage on checks with one ability (plus a minor rider, e.g. Con grants 2d6 temp HP). +1 target per slot above 2nd.

spells.name: Find Traps
spells.text: Sense the presence of any trap within range and line of sight (not its location or nature).

spells.name: Gentle Repose
spells.text: A corpse is protected from decay and can't become undead; extends the time limit on raising it.

spells.name: Locate Object
spells.text: Sense the direction to a familiar object within 1,000 ft, if it's that close.

spells.name: Protection from Poison
spells.text: Neutralize one poison on a creature; for the duration it has advantage on saves vs poison and resistance to poison damage.

spells.name: Zone of Truth
spells.text: A 15-ft-radius zone; creatures in it (Cha save) can't speak deliberate lies. They know they're affected; can still evade.

spells.name: Scorching Ray
spells.text: Three rays, each a ranged spell attack for 2d6 fire. +1 ray per slot above 2nd.

spells.name: Misty Step
spells.text: Teleport up to 30 ft to an unoccupied space you can see.

spells.name: Mirror Image
spells.text: Three duplicates; attacks may hit a duplicate instead (destroyed when hit). They mimic and move with you.

spells.name: Invisibility
spells.text: A creature becomes invisible; ends if it attacks or casts. +1 target per slot above 2nd.

spells.name: Suggestion
spells.text: A reasonable-sounding course of action (a sentence or two); Wis save or the target pursues it.

spells.name: Darkness
spells.text: 15-ft-radius magical darkness; darkvision can't see through it. Suppressed by a light spell of 2nd+ level.

spells.name: Spider Climb
spells.text: A willing creature gains a climbing speed equal to its walking speed, including ceilings, hands free.

spells.name: Crown of Madness
spells.text: A humanoid (Wis save) is charmed; each turn you direct it to make one melee attack. Use your action to maintain; it re-saves each turn.

spells.name: Cloud of Daggers
spells.text: A 5-ft cube of spinning blades; 4d4 slashing on entering/starting a turn there. +2d4 per slot above 2nd.

spells.name: Blur
spells.text: Attackers have disadvantage against you unless they don't rely on sight.

spells.name: Alter Self
spells.text: Choose: adapt to water-breathing/swim, change appearance, or grow natural weapons (1d6 + your usual mods, magical).

spells.name: Detect Thoughts
spells.text: Read the surface thoughts of a creature within 30 ft (Wis save to resist deeper probing); can search for any thinking minds nearby.

spells.name: Enlarge/Reduce
spells.text: A creature/object grows (advantage Str, +1d4 weapon damage) or shrinks (disadvantage Str, −1d4 weapon damage) one size.

spells.name: Gust of Wind
spells.text: A 60-ft line of strong wind; Str save or pushed 15 ft; disperses gas/vapor; difficult terrain against the wind.

spells.name: Knock
spells.text: Unlock one locked/stuck/barred object; a loud knock audible 300 ft.

spells.name: Levitate
spells.text: A creature or object (Con save if unwilling) rises up to 20 ft and can be moved vertically; you direct it.

spells.name: See Invisibility
spells.text: See invisible creatures and objects, and into the Ethereal Plane (grayish, ghostly).

spells.name: Web
spells.text: Fill a 20-ft cube with webs (difficult terrain); Dex save on entering/starting there or restrained (Str check to break free). Flammable.

spells.name: Enthrall
spells.text: Chosen creatures (Wis save) have disadvantage on Perception to notice anything but you.

spells.name: Revivify
spells.text: A creature dead ≤1 minute returns with 1 HP. No restored limbs; no return for death of old age.

spells.name: Spirit Guardians
spells.text: Spectral guardians; enemies' difficult terrain; on entering/starting a turn there, Wis save, 3d8 radiant or necrotic (half on success). +1d8 per slot above 3rd.

spells.name: Dispel Magic
spells.text: End spells ≤3rd level automatically; higher needs an ability check (DC 10 + spell level) each.

spells.name: Mass Healing Word
spells.text: Up to six creatures regain 1d4 + mod HP. No effect on undead/constructs. +1d4 per slot above 3rd.

spells.name: Beacon of Hope
spells.text: Any number of creatures gain advantage on Wis and death saves, and regain max HP from any healing.

spells.name: Animate Dead
spells.text: Animate a corpse/bones as a skeleton or zombie. Reassert control within 24 hrs (bonus action) or it turns hostile. +more per slot above 3rd.

spells.name: Bestow Curse
spells.text: A creature (Wis save) is cursed: disadvantage on one ability, disadvantage attacking you, lost turn on a failed Wis save, or +1d8 necrotic from you. Higher slots extend.

spells.name: Daylight
spells.text: 60-ft-radius bright light (+60 ft dim). Dispels magical darkness of 3rd level or lower.

spells.name: Remove Curse
spells.text: End all curses on a creature; for a cursed item, break attunement so it can be removed (doesn't end the item's curse itself).

spells.name: Sending
spells.text: Send a 25-word message to a familiar creature anywhere; it can reply. Cross-planar has a chance to fail.

spells.name: Speak with Dead
spells.text: A corpse with a mouth answers up to five questions. It won't reveal what it didn't know in life; answers may be brief or evasive.

spells.name: Tongues
spells.text: A creature understands any spoken language and is understood by anyone who shares a language with it.

spells.name: Water Walk
spells.text: Up to ten creatures can move across liquid surfaces as if solid ground.

spells.name: Water Breathing
spells.text: Up to ten creatures can breathe underwater (keeping their normal air-breathing too).

spells.name: Create Food and Water
spells.text: Create 45 lb of food and 30 gallons of water — enough for 15 humanoids or 5 mounts for a day.

spells.name: Magic Circle
spells.text: A 10-ft cylinder warded against a chosen creature type: they can't enter/charm/frighten it, attack at disadvantage. Or invert it to trap.

spells.name: Glyph of Warding
spells.text: Inscribe a glyph that triggers a stored spell or a burst of energy (up to 5d8, type chosen) when conditions are met.

spells.name: Protection from Energy
spells.text: A creature gains resistance to one damage type: acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder.

spells.name: Meld into Stone
spells.text: Step into a stone object/surface large enough to fit you; sense and emerge at will.

spells.name: Clairvoyance
spells.text: Create an invisible sensor at a known/obvious location to see or hear there.

spells.name: Fireball
spells.text: 20-ft-radius; Dex save, 8d6 fire (half on success). Ignites flammables. +1d6 per slot above 3rd.

spells.name: Counterspell
spells.text: Reaction to a creature casting: a spell ≤3rd level fails; higher needs an ability check (DC 10 + spell level).

spells.name: Fly
spells.text: A willing creature gains a 60-ft flying speed. +1 target per slot above 3rd.

spells.name: Haste
spells.text: A creature: +2 AC, advantage on Dex saves, doubled speed, one extra limited action. On end, it can't move/act until after its next turn.

spells.name: Slow
spells.text: Up to six creatures in a 40-ft cube (Wis save): half speed, −2 AC and Dex saves, no reactions, action OR bonus action only. Re-save each turn.

spells.name: Lightning Bolt
spells.text: 100-ft line; Dex save, 8d6 lightning (half on success). +1d6 per slot above 3rd.

spells.name: Hypnotic Pattern
spells.text: 30-ft cube; Wis save or charmed: incapacitated, speed 0. Ends on damage or a shake-awake action. (Got the Sunken Frets DQ'd at Trill-fest.)

spells.name: Sleet Storm
spells.text: 20-ft-tall, 40-ft-radius cylinder of freezing rain: difficult terrain, heavily obscured, open flames out; Dex save to stay standing; Con save to keep concentration.

spells.name: Stinking Cloud
spells.text: 20-ft-radius cloud; a creature starting its turn there makes a Con save or loses its action retching. Heavily obscured.

spells.name: Gaseous Form
spells.text: A willing creature becomes a misty cloud: nonmagical resistance, advantage on Str/Dex/Con saves, 10-ft fly, fits through small gaps, can't attack/cast/speak.

spells.name: Major Image
spells.text: A detailed illusion up to a 20-ft cube with sound, smell, and temperature; you can move it. Investigation to discern.

spells.name: Fear
spells.text: 30-ft cone; Wis save or drop held items and flee, frightened. Re-save each turn (disadvantage if it can see you).

spells.name: Blink
spells.text: At each turn's end, roll d20: on 11+ you vanish to the Ethereal Plane and return at the start of your next turn near where you left.

spells.name: Tiny Hut
spells.text: A 10-ft dome shelters up to nine creatures; blocks weather and (in one direction) ranged attacks; you choose its interior light.

spells.name: Vampiric Touch
spells.text: Melee spell attack; 3d6 necrotic and you regain half. Repeat as an action each turn. +1d6 per slot above 3rd.

spells.name: Hunger of Hadar
spells.text: A 20-ft void of blackness and cold: blinded area, difficult terrain; 2d6 cold starting a turn there; Dex save or 2d6 acid ending a turn there.
